articles.description: Gastroenterologists reveal the number-one sign of colon cancer. Plus, other symptoms to watch for and why the illness can be difficult to diagnose.
articles.content: When its caught early, colon cancer is highly treatable. According to Johns Hopkins Medicine, the five-year survival rate of early-stage, localized colon cancer is 90%. One of the best strategies for… [+2227 chars]
